creator: lacey.leanne@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 187072
security/chkrootkit 0.51 to 0.52 update

This is a simple Makefile and dist-info update, validated against the provided md5 from chkrootkit.org, and double-checked the sha256.

Builds with poudriere testport on 10.3-RELEASE, 10.4-RELEASE, 11.0-RELEASE, and 11.1-RELEASE amd64 and i386.
